headline: 3 Reasons STZ is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since December 2025, Constellation Brands has been in a holding pattern, posting a small return of 2.9% while floating around $146.70. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.3% gain during that period.
